events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: From stadium anthems to iconic solos, Brian May's guitar work is instantly recognisable. Wishing the Queen legend a very happy 79th birthday today!

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Rocking
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding stages worldwide! Happy birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger, a true rock and roll legend.

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever played.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV burst onto screens, forever changing music and television. And what better way to kick it all off than with The Buggles' prophetic hit?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the game. Still sounds as fresh and vital today. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal event in music history, kicked off on this day in 1969, lasting four days.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic moment that defined a generation.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today, the music world fell silent as we said goodbye to Elvis Presley. His legacy as The King lives on.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur was shot
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, iconic rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot in Las Vegas, succumbing to his injuries six days later on September 13th.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: Thirty years since the tragic shooting of Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and influence continue to resonate through generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away in 1970.

angles.name: Remembering Hendrix
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, we lost one of the greatest guitarists of all time, Jimi Hendrix. His innovative sound continues to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969 in the UK.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks – pure genius. What's your favourite from the record?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon, still delivering those powerful vocals and unforgettable tunes.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock N Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that swagger and those unmistakable vocals. What's your favourite Liam track?

events.title: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic solo single 'Imagine' was released on this day in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A timeless anthem for peace and unity that still resonates today.

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod was unveiled
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the very first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music on the go.

angles.name: Pocket Full Of Music
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? 25 years ago, Apple introduced the iPod, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing music forever.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Today is James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: It's James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of 007, from iconic themes to unforgettable gadgets. What's your favourite Bond moment?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is unparalleled. Wishing him a very silly day!
